ns0:entry.ns0:title: Automattic/jetpack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Automattic/jetpack
Language: php
Security, performance, marketing, and design tools — Jetpack is made by WordPress experts to make WP sites safer and faster, and help you grow your traffic.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AzuraCast/AzuraCast
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AzuraCast/AzuraCast
Language: php
A self-hosted web radio management suite, including turnkey installer tools for the full radio software stack and a modern, easy-to-use web app to manage your stations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Dolibarr/dolibarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Dolibarr/dolibarr
Language: php
Dolibarr ERP CRM is a modern software package to manage your company or foundation's activity (contacts, suppliers, invoices, orders, stocks, agenda, accounting, ...). it's an open source Web application (written in PHP) designed for businesses of any sizes, foundations and freelancers.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FreshRSS/FreshRSS

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Paymenter/Paymenter
Language: php
Free and open-source webshop solution for hostings

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/wordpress-develop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/wordpress-develop
Language: php
WordPress Develop, Git-ified. Synced from git://develop.git.wordpress.org/, including branches and tags! This repository is just a mirror of the WordPress subversion repository. Please include a link to a pre-existing ticket on https://core.trac.wordpress.org/ with every pull request.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: akaunting/akaunting
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/akaunting/akaunting
Language: php
Online Accounting Software

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cedar2025/Xboard
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cedar2025/Xboard
Language: php
High-performance panel based on V2board secondary development supporting new protocols and new features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coollabsio/coolify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coollabsio/coolify
Language: php
An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/SecLists
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/SecLists
Language: php
SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: firefly-iii/firefly-iii
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firefly-iii/firefly-iii
Language: php
Firefly III: a personal finances manager

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/koel/koel
Language: php
Music streaming solution that works.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: laravel/ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/laravel/ai
Language: php
The Laravel AI SDK provides a unified, expressive API for interacting with AI providers such as OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: linuxserver/Heimdall
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/linuxserver/Heimdall
Language: php
An Application dashboard and launcher

ns0:entry.ns0:title: matomo-org/matomo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/matomo-org/matomo
Language: php
Empowering People Ethically 🚀 — Matomo is hiring! Join us → https://matomo.org/jobs Matomo is the leading open-source alternative to Google Analytics, giving you complete control and built-in privacy. Easily collect, visualise, and analyse data from websites & apps. Star us on GitHub ⭐️ – Pull Requests welcome!

Language: php

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nextcloud/all-in-one
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nextcloud/all-in-one
Language: php
📦 The official Nextcloud installation method. Provides easy deployment and maintenance with most features included in this one Nextcloud instance.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opensourcepos/opensourcepos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opensourcepos/opensourcepos
Language: php
Open Source Point of Sale is a web based point of sale application written in PHP using CodeIgniter framework. It uses MySQL as the data back end and has a Bootstrap 3 based user interface. If you like this project, please give it a star! Doing so helps maintain Popular OSS status for the project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: processwire/processwire
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/processwire/processwire
Language: php
ProcessWire 3.x is a friendly and powerful open source CMS with a strong API.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pterodactyl/panel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pterodactyl/panel
Language: php
Pterodactyl® is a free, open-source game server management panel built with PHP, React, and Go. Designed with security in mind, Pterodactyl runs all game servers in isolated Docker containers while exposing a beautiful and intuitive UI to end users.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rectorphp/rector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rectorphp/rector
Language: php
Instant Upgrades and Automated Refactoring of any PHP 5.3+ code
